source_pr.title: session: support validating read-only statement during read-only staleness transaction
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/21824

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Support validating read-only statement during read-only staleness transaction 

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

* No release note

symptoms: // TableDeltaMap lock to prevent potential data race
failure_signature: // TableDeltaMap lock to prevent potential data race
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness was caused by a data race on shared transaction-context state (`TxnCtx.TableDeltaMap`) accessed across execution paths. This PR stabilizes it by introducing a dedicated mutex (`tdmLock`) in `TransactionContext` and using it to guard cleanup/clear of `TableDeltaMap`, preventing concurrent access races (especially under `-race`).
fix_pattern: Introduce `TransactionContext.tdmLock` and guard `TableDeltaMap` cleanup/clearing with it to avoid concurrent access races.

evidence: evidence: // TableDeltaMap lock to prevent potential data race

files: executor/executor_test.go, executor/prepared.go, executor/simple.go, go.mod, go.sum, kv/interface_mock_test.go, kv/kv.go, session/session.go, session/session_test.go, sessionctx/context.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go, store/tikv/kv.go, store/tikv/txn.go, util/mock/context.go, util/mock/store.go
